name: LEDGER
tagline: ML-driven asset discovery for top tier insurance firm

starry.situation: A top-tier insurance company struggled to manage its $69M technology fleet. Manual plant surveys took 7-9 weeks and delivered inconsistent results — approximately 75% accuracy — delaying support and weakening compliance and license governance.
starry.task: Replace manual surveys with an automated, ML-based spidering inventory engine that continuously discovers, validates, and reports on assets with high confidence at enterprise scale.
starry.action: Designed and deployed an ML-driven asset discovery platform that continuously crawled the environment, validated findings against authoritative sources, and reconciled discrepancies automatically. Built reporting dashboards for compliance, license management, and capacity planning teams.
starry.result: Asset inventory accuracy improved to 99.9%. Survey cycle reduced from 7-9 weeks to near real-time. Reporting lag reduced by 99.93%.
starry.return: Significant reduction in compliance risk and license overspend. Operational savings from eliminating manual survey cycles across a $69M fleet.
starry.yield: Transformed asset management from a reactive, manual burden into a real-time strategic capability — strengthening compliance, reducing operational risk, and demonstrating the tangible value of automation and ML in IT operations.
